phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Les Abattoirs modern art museum is nearby
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que le musée Les Abattoirs est proche d'ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh luh myoo-ZAY lay-ZAH-bah-TWAHR eh PROSH dee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: Les Abattoirs, a former slaughterhouse converted into a modern and contemporary art museum, is one of Saint-Cyprien's cultural anchors.

responses.english: Yes, ten minutes walk, toward the quays.
responses.phonetic: ES suh kuh luh moo-ZAY lay za-ba-TWAHR ES PROSH dee-SEE
responses.local: Oui, dix minutes à pied, vers les quais.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sunday morning flea market is held
phrases.text_local: Où se tient le marché aux puces le dimanche matin dans ce quartier ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TYAN luh mar-SHAY oh PYOOS luh dee-MAHNSH mah-TAN dahn suh kar-TYAY
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Cyprien's Sunday market along the allées Charles-de-Fitte is one of the most popular in Toulouse.

responses.english: It is at Saint-Cyprien square, behind the church.
responses.phonetic: OO suh TYAN luh MAR-shay o PYOOS luh dee-MANSH ma-TAN dan suh kar-TYAY
responses.local: Il se place Saint-Cyprien, juste derrière l'église.

phrases.intent_en: Ask a café owner if they have wifi
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que vous avez une connexion wifi pour les clients ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh voo-ZAH-vay yoon koh-nek-SYON WEE-fee poor lay klee-AHN
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Cyprien has a lively café scene popular with students and artists from the nearby art school.

responses.english: Yes, code indicated on the ticket.
responses.local: Oui, code indiqué sur le ticket.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the Garonne river bank from here
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous m'indiquer le chemin vers les berges de la Garonne ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY-voo mahn-dee-KAY luh shuh-MAN vair lay BAIRZH duh lah gah-RON
phrases.cultural_note: The Garonne river banks (berges) in Saint-Cyprien are popular for evening walks and have been landscaped with gardens and cycle paths.

responses.english: Go straight down towards the river, five minutes.
responses.phonetic: poor-YAY voo man-dee-KAY luh SHMAN shuh-MAN VAIR l
responses.local: Descendez tout droit vers la rivière, à cinq minutes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a good tapas bar in this neighbourhood
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un bon bar à tapas dans ce quartier ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL un bohn BAR ah tah-PAHS dahn suh kar-TYAY
phrases.cultural_note: The proximity of Toulouse to Spain and the Basque Country means tapas bars are common and popular, especially in Saint-Cyprien.

responses.english: Yes, there is an excellent tapas bar on Saint-Cyprien square.
responses.phonetic: ee-GREK ah tay eel uhn BON bar ah TA-pah dah(n) suh kar-TYAY
responses.local: Oui, il y a un excellent bar à tapas sur la place Saint-Cyprien.
